targets.expr: sum by (service) (rate({service=~"$service"} | json llm_tokens_input="llm_response_usage.input_tokens", llm_tokens_output="llm_response_usage.output_tokens", cost="llm_response_usage.provider_reported_cost", llm_msg="message" | llm_msg="llm_stream_response" | unwrap llm_tokens_input [2m])) * 60

sum by (service) (rate({service=~"$service"} | json llm_tokens_input="llm_response_usage.input_tokens", llm_tokens_output="llm_response_usage.output_tokens", cost="llm_response_usage.provider_reported_cost", llm_msg="message" | llm_msg="llm_stream_response" | unwrap llm_tokens_output [2m])) * 60
quantile_over_time(0.99, {service=~"$service"} | json | message="llm_stream_response" | unwrap llm_duration_ms [2m]) by (service)

sum by (service) (rate({service=~"$service"} | json | message="llm_stream_response" | level="ERROR" [2m])) / sum by (service) (rate({service=~"$service"} | json | message="llm_stream_response" [2m])) * 100

panels.title: LLM Cost (₽)

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service=~"$service"} | json | message="llm_stream_response" | llm_url=~".*openrouter.*" | unwrap llm_response_usage_provider_reported_cost [2m])) * 85
sum(sum_over_time({service=~"$service"} | json | message="llm_stream_response" | llm_url=~".*bothub.*" | unwrap llm_response_usage_provider_reported_cost [2m]))

panels.description: OpenRouter: USD × 85 (курс из billing.usd_to_rub_rate). BotHub: провайдер выставляет в рублях напрямую. Курс в конфиге: conf.json → billing.usd_to_rub_rate = 85
